articles.title: SpaceX Sets New Record With Latest Starlink Launch
articles.description:
SpaceX kicked off the week with yet another industry-shifting milestone, launching 29 additional Starlink satellites to low Earth orbit on Monday aboard a Falcon 9 booster flying for a record 32nd time. The mission lifted off from Launch Complex 39A at NASA’s Kennedy Space Center in Florida at 2:26 p.m. PT/5:26 p.m. ET, marking the […]

articles.title: Tesla Full Self-Driving statistic impresses Wall Street firm: ‘Very close to unsupervised’
articles.description:
The data shows there was a significant jump in miles traveled between interventions as Tesla transitioned drivers to v14.1 back in October. The FSD Community Tracker saw a jump from 441 miles to over 9,200 miles, the most significant improvement in four years.
